grammar.title: Present Simple
grammar.description: Presens enkelt — hur vi berättar om vanor och fakta.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses the present simple correctly?
options: She go to school every day.
She goes to school every day.
She is go to school every day.
She going to school every day.
exercises.explanation: With he/she/it in present simple, add -s to the verb: go → goes.
exercises.hint: He/she/it-formen slutar på -s eller -es.
Med 'he' i presens: lägg till -s på grundformen.
exercises.explanation: With he/she/it in present simple, we add -s: play → plays.

exercises.question: Choose the correct present simple form: 'She ___ English every day.'
exercises.explanation: Verbs ending in consonant+y: change y to i and add -es. study → studies.
exercises.hint: Slutar verbet på -y? Byt ut y mot -ies.
Negation i presens med I/you/we/they: don't + grundform.
exercises.explanation: Negative present simple with we: don't + base verb.

exercises.question: Which question is correct in present simple?
exercises.explanation: Questions with he/she/it use 'does' + base verb (no -s on main verb).
exercises.hint: Frågor med he/she/it: Does + subject + grundform?
Verb som slutar på -ch: lägg till -es.
exercises.explanation: Verbs ending in -ch add -es: watch → watches.

exercises.instruction: Build a correct present simple sentence.
exercises.explanation: The sun rises in the east. – rise → rises with he/she/it.

exercises.question: 'They ___ to the gym three times a week.'
exercises.explanation: With they, use the base form: go (no -s).
exercises.hint: Med they/we/I/you: grundformen utan -s.
Med she/he/it i frågor: Does...?
exercises.explanation: We use 'Does' for he/she/it in questions.

exercises.question: Which sentence is negative present simple?
exercises.explanation: Negative with she/he/it: doesn't + base verb (no -s).
exercises.hint: Negation med she: doesn't + grundform.
'Have' är oregelbundet: he/she/it has.
exercises.explanation: 'Have' is irregular: he/she/it has (not haves).

exercises.question: 'The train ___ at 8 am every morning.'
exercises.explanation: Timetabled events use present simple. leave → leaves (he/she/it).
exercises.hint: Tidtabeller och schema använder presens.
Negation med I: don't + grundform.
exercises.explanation: Negative present simple with I: don't + base verb.

exercises.instruction: Build a correct present simple question.
exercises.explanation: Does he play the guitar? – he takes does in questions.

exercises.question: Which is true about present simple?
options: It is used for actions happening right now only.
It describes habits, facts, and routines.
It can only be used with 'I'.
exercises.explanation: Present simple describes habits (every day), facts (water boils), and routines.
exercises.hint: Presens används för vanor, fakta och rutiner.

helpText: Present simple (presens) använder vi för vanor, rutiner och fakta som alltid stämmer.
Regel: Med he/she/it → lägg till -s (play→plays). Slutar på -ch/-sh/-x/-o → -es (watch→watches). Slutar på konsonant+y → -ies (study→studies).
Negation: I/you/we/they + don't + grundform. He/she/it + doesn't + grundform.
Frågor: Do you...? / Does she...? (OBS: inte 'Does she likes?' – verb i grundform efter does!)
Signalerord: always, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day/week.

grammar.title: Past Simple
grammar.description: Preteritum — berätta om saker som hände.

exercises.question: What is the past simple form of 'go'?
exercises.explanation: 'Go' is an irregular verb. Its past simple form is 'went'.
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb: go → went.
Regelbundna verb + -ed i datid.
exercises.explanation: Regular verbs form past simple by adding -ed: walk → walked.

exercises.question: Which sentence is in the past simple?
options: She is going to the market.
She has gone to the market.
exercises.explanation: 'Went' is the past simple form of go.
exercises.hint: Datid (past simple) berättar om något som hände och är klart.
Regelbundet verb: visit + -ed = visited.
exercises.explanation: Regular verb: visit → visited (add -ed).

exercises.question: What is the past simple of 'see'?
exercises.explanation: 'See' is irregular: past simple is 'saw'.
exercises.hint: see → saw (oregelbundet)

exercises.sentence: She ___ (not/come) to the party last night.
exercises.hint: Negation i datid: didn't + grundform.
exercises.explanation: Negative past simple: didn't + base verb.
Tom played chess yesterday. – regular verb play → played.

exercises.question: '___ you enjoy the film last night?'
exercises.explanation: Questions in past simple use 'did' + base verb.
exercises.hint: Frågor i datid: Did + subject + grundform?

exercises.sentence: They ___ (buy) new shoes at the mall.
exercises.hint: buy → bought (oregelbundet)
exercises.explanation: 'Buy' is irregular: buy → bought.

exercises.question: What is the past simple of 'write'?
exercises.explanation: 'Write' is irregular: past simple is 'wrote'.
exercises.hint: write → wrote (oregelbundet)

exercises.sentence: ___ he ___ (finish) his homework? Yes, he did.
exercises.hint: Fråga i datid: Did + subject + grundform?
exercises.explanation: Did he finish…? – past simple question uses 'did' + base verb.

exercises.question: Which time expression goes with past simple?
exercises.explanation: 'Last Monday' is a past time expression that signals past simple.
exercises.hint: Tidsmarkörer för datid: yesterday, last week, ago...

exercises.sentence: I ___ (stop) running because I was tired.
exercises.hint: Verb som slutar på konsonant-vokal-konsonant: dubblera sista konsonanten + -ed.
exercises.explanation: Stop → stopped (double the final consonant before -ed).

exercises.instruction: Build a past simple negative sentence.
exercises.explanation: She didn't sleep well last night. – negative past simple.

exercises.question: What is the past simple of 'have'?
exercises.explanation: 'Have' is irregular: past simple is 'had'.
exercises.hint: have → had (oregelbundet)

helpText: Past simple (preteritum) används för händelser som är HELT AVSLUTADE i det förflutna.
Regelbundna verb: lägg till -ed. walk→walked, play→played, stop→stopped (dubbla konsonant).
Oregelbundna verb måste memoreras: go→went, eat→ate, see→saw, have→had, come→came, take→took.
Negation + frågor: använd did/didn't + GRUNDFORM. 'Did she go?' / 'She didn't go.' (inte 'She didn't went'!)
Signalerord: yesterday, last week, ago, in 2010, when I was young.

grammar.title: Adjectives & Comparisons
grammar.description: Adjektiv och att jämföra saker på engelska.

exercises.question: Which is the comparative form of 'big'?
exercises.explanation: Short adjectives: add -er. big → bigger (double the final consonant).
exercises.hint: Korta adjektiv: -er. big → bigger.

exercises.sentence: Mount Everest is the ___ (high) mountain in the world.
exercises.hint: Superlativ av korta adjektiv: -est. high → highest.
exercises.explanation: Superlative of short adjectives: add -est.

exercises.question: Which is the superlative form of 'beautiful'?
exercises.explanation: Long adjectives (3+ syllables) use 'most' for superlative.
exercises.hint: Långa adjektiv: most + adjektiv.

exercises.sentence: This test is ___ (difficult) than the last one.
exercises.hint: Långa adjektiv: more + adjektiv i komparativ.
exercises.explanation: Long adjectives use 'more' for comparative: more difficult.

exercises.question: 'My bag is ___ than yours.' Choose the correct comparative of 'heavy'.
exercises.explanation: Adjectives ending in -y: change y to i, add -er. heavy → heavier.
exercises.hint: Adjektiv på -y: byt -y mot -ier.
Kort adjektiv som slutar på -t: dubblera konsonanten + -er.
exercises.explanation: hot → hotter (double t before -er).

exercises.question: 'This is ___ film I have ever seen.' Choose the correct superlative.
exercises.explanation: 'Good' has irregular forms: good – better – best.
exercises.hint: good → better → best (oregelbundet)
Superlativ: the + -est.
exercises.explanation: Superlative: the + adjective + -est. tallest = tallest.
A car is faster than a bicycle. – comparative with -er.

exercises.question: Which adjective describes a feeling?
exercises.explanation: 'Angry' describes an emotion/feeling. It answers 'How do you feel?'
exercises.hint: Adjektiv kan beskriva känslor, utseende eller egenskaper.

exercises.sentence: This pizza is ___ (good) than the one we had yesterday.
exercises.hint: good → better → best (oregelbundet)
exercises.explanation: 'Good' is irregular: comparative is 'better'.

exercises.question: Ella is ___ as Tom. They are the same height.
exercises.explanation: To say two things are equal, use 'as + adjective + as'.
exercises.hint: Lika jämförelse: as + adjektiv + as.

exercises.sentence: The Sahara is ___ (large) desert in the world.
exercises.hint: Superlativ: the + -est.
exercises.explanation: large → the largest. (drop e, add -st)
She is the most intelligent student in class. – long adjective superlative.

exercises.question: What is the comparative of 'bad'?
exercises.explanation: 'Bad' is irregular: bad – worse – worst.
exercises.hint: bad → worse → worst (oregelbundet)

helpText: Adjektiv beskriver substantiv: big, small, fast, beautiful, interesting.
Komparativ (jämföra 2 saker): korta adjektiv + -er: bigger, faster. Långa adjektiv (3+ stavelser): more + adjektiv: more interesting, more beautiful.
Superlativ (störst av alla): korta adjektiv: the + -est: the biggest. Långa: the most + adjektiv: the most interesting.
Oregelbundna: good→better→the best, bad→worse→the worst, far→farther→the farthest.
Tänk: Jämför du 2 saker? → komparativ (-er/more). Jämför du med ALLA? → superlativ (the -est/most).

grammar.title: Prepositions of Place & Time
grammar.description: In, on, at, under — beskriv var och när saker är.

exercises.question: 'The book is ___ the table.' Which preposition of place fits?
exercises.explanation: 'On' is used for surfaces: the book is on the table.
exercises.hint: 'On' = på en yta.

exercises.sentence: The cat is hiding ___ the sofa.
exercises.hint: 'Under' = nedanför, under något.
exercises.explanation: 'Under' indicates position below something.

exercises.question: 'She arrived ___ Monday.' Which preposition of time is correct?
exercises.explanation: Use 'on' with days of the week: on Monday.
exercises.hint: 'On' + dag i veckan/datum.
'In' + år/månad/årstid.
exercises.explanation: Use 'in' with years, months, and seasons: in 2012.

exercises.question: 'The meeting starts ___ 3 o'clock.' Choose the correct preposition.
exercises.explanation: Use 'at' with specific times: at 3 o'clock.
exercises.hint: 'At' + klockslag.

exercises.sentence: There is a supermarket ___ the school and the park.
exercises.hint: 'Between' = mellan (två saker).
exercises.explanation: 'Between' shows position in the middle of two things.

exercises.instruction: Build a sentence with a preposition of place.
exercises.explanation: The dog is in front of the house. – preposition of place.

exercises.question: 'We go to school ___ September ___ June.'
exercises.explanation: 'From … to' shows duration: from September to June.
exercises.hint: 'From … to' = från … till.

exercises.sentence: She put her keys ___ her bag.
exercises.hint: 'In' = inuti något.
exercises.explanation: 'In' indicates position inside something.

exercises.question: 'He lives ___ the third floor.' Which preposition?
exercises.explanation: Use 'on' with floors: on the third floor.
exercises.hint: Våningsplan: on the first/second floor.
'In' + del av dagen (morning, afternoon, evening).
exercises.explanation: Use 'in' with parts of the day: in the morning.

exercises.question: 'The pharmacy is ___ the bank.' (next to it)
exercises.explanation: 'Next to' means directly beside something.
exercises.hint: 'Next to' = bredvid.
'At' + klockslag.
exercises.explanation: Use 'at' for specific clock times: at 8:30.

exercises.instruction: Build a sentence with a preposition of time.
exercises.explanation: We always visit grandma on Sundays. – 'on' + day.

exercises.question: 'The picture is hanging ___ the wall.'
exercises.explanation: 'On' is used for things attached to/placed on surfaces: on the wall.
exercises.hint: 'On' = på en yta eller vägg.

helpText: In, on, at används både för PLATS och TID – men med olika mönster!
Tid: in + lång period (in the morning, in January, in 2024). on + dag/datum (on Monday, on 5 March). at + exakt tidpunkt (at 8 o'clock, at noon, at night).
Plats: in = inuti (in the box, in Sweden). on = på en yta (on the table, on the wall). at = vid en punkt (at school, at the bus stop).
Tänk för tid: in (år/månad) → on (dag) → at (klockslag) – stor enhet till liten enhet!

grammar.title: Verb tenses
grammar.description: Presens, preteritum och pågående form – öva verb i olika tider.

exercises.hint: Presens för 'she': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

exercises.question: We ___ TV yesterday.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.

exercises.question: I ___ breakfast at 7 o'clock.
exercises.hint: Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

exercises.question: She ___ to music now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: He ___ a bike.
exercises.hint: Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

exercises.question: They ___ in the park now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: We ___ dinner at 6.
exercises.hint: Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: I ___ to school every day.
exercises.hint: Tidsadverb 'every/always/often/usually' → presens (present simple).
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: She ___ coffee every morning.
exercises.hint: Presens för she/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: He ___ playing football now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

helpText: I den här övningen tränar du på att välja rätt tempus (verb-tid).
Present simple: vanor och fakta (She walks to school every day).
Past simple: avslutat i det förflutna (She walked to school yesterday).
Present continuous: pågår just nu (She is walking to school now).
Tänk: NÄR händer det? Nu = continuous. Alltid/vana = simple. Förr, klart = past.

grammar.title: Verb tenses – del 2
grammar.description: Fler övningar på verb i presens, preteritum och pågående form.

exercises.hint: Presens för 'she': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.

exercises.question: They ___ dinner yesterday.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: He ___ already finished.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: She ___ to music every day.
exercises.hint: Presens för she/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: I ___ my homework yesterday.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Presens för 'he': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.

exercises.question: We ___ going to the park.
exercises.hint: Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: They ___ in London last year.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

exercises.question: He ___ playing right now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: She ___ her homework now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.

exercises.question: I ___ never been to Spain.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: We ___ finished our project.
exercises.hint: Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.

helpText: Fortsätt öva på att välja rätt tempus – titta noga på tidsuttrycken i meningen!
Signalord för past simple: yesterday, last night, ago, in [år].
Signalord för present simple: always, usually, every day, often.
Signalord för present continuous: now, at the moment, currently, look! listen!
Tips: Hitta signalordet i meningen – det berättar ofta vilken tid du ska använda.

grammar.title: Verb tenses – del 3
grammar.description: Ännu fler övningar på verb i presens, preteritum och pågående form.

exercises.hint: Presens för 'she': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.

exercises.question: They ___ to school yesterday.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Tidsadverb 'every/always/often/usually' → presens (present simple).

exercises.question: He ___ TV now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: She ___ already finished.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: I ___ never seen that film.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: We ___ dinner at six.
exercises.hint: Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: They ___ playing outside.
exercises.hint: Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: He ___ breakfast every morning.
exercises.hint: Presens för he/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.

exercises.question: She ___ to music yesterday.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: I ___ my homework last night.
exercises.hint: Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.

exercises.question: We ___ going home now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: They ___ finished the test.
exercises.hint: Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

exercises.question: He ___ swimming now.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: She ___ English every day.
exercises.hint: Presens för she/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: I ___ already eaten.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: We ___ watching TV.
exercises.hint: Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?

helpText: Nu blandas tempus – var uppmärksam på kontexten i varje mening!
Läs hela meningen innan du väljer – ibland hjälper den andra halvan av meningen.
Past simple vs present perfect: past simple = avslutat, specifik tid. Present perfect = koppling till nu.
Exempel: 'I saw her yesterday' (past simple). 'I have seen her' (present perfect, kopplat till nu).

grammar.title: Verb & tider – del 4
grammar.description: Fler övningar på verb i olika tempus.

exercises.hint: Presens för 'she': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Presens för he/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Presens för she/she/it: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Tidmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).
Perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip. I/you/we/they → have. He/she/it → has.
Tänk på vilket tempus som passar: vilket är tidsmärket i meningen?
Presens för 'he': lägg till -s/es på grundformen. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.
Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.

helpText: Fler tempusövningar – fokusera på om handlingen är avslutad eller pågående!
Past continuous (was/were + -ing): en pågående handling i det förflutna som avbryts.
Exempel: 'I was reading when the phone rang.' (läste = pågående, ringde = avbryter).
Tänk: Pågick det (was/were + -ing)? Avbröts det av något (past simple)?

grammar.title: Verb & tider – del 5
grammar.description: Fler övningar på verb och tempus.

exercises.question: She ___ to school by bus.
exercises.hint: Titta på subjektet 'she' och tidsmärket. Presens för he/she/it slutar på -s.
Datid nekad: 'did not' + grundform (oavsett pronomen). T.ex. 'did not play'.

exercises.question: I ___ already finished my homework.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Presens för he: grundform + -s/es. T.ex. play → plays, go → goes.

exercises.question: We ___ lunch when it started to rain.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling i dåtid: was/were + verb-ing. T.ex. 'were having dinner'.
Dåtid av 'to be' nekad: 'was not' (I/he/she/it) eller 'were not' (you/we/they).

exercises.question: They ___ just arrived.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Tidsmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: He ___ English since 2021.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: She ___ breakfast before school.
exercises.hint: Titta på subjektet 'she' och tidsmärket. Presens för he/she/it slutar på -s.
Tidsmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: I ___ never eaten sushi.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing.

exercises.question: We ___ friends for many years.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Titta på subjektet 'she' och tidsmärket. Presens för he/she/it slutar på -s.

exercises.question: They ___ dinner when I called.
exercises.hint: Pågående handling i dåtid: was/were + verb-ing. T.ex. 'were having dinner'.
Tidsmarkörer som 'yesterday', 'last year', 'ago' → datid (past simple).

exercises.question: He ___ already seen that movie.
exercises.hint: Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.
Nyckelord som since/for/just/already/never → perfekt: have/has + perfektparticip.

helpText: Sista tempus-övningen – du klarar det här!
Kom ihåg: hitta tidsuttrycken och signalorden i varje mening.
Tänk igenom: Vana? → present simple. Avslutat i förr? → past simple. Pågår nu? → present continuous.

grammar.title: Blandad grammatik
grammar.description: Presens vs kontinuerlig, some/any, objektspronomen, will vs going to och mer.

exercises.question: She usually ___ (walk) to school.
exercises.hint: 'Usually' visar en vana → presens (present simple). Med he/she/it: lägg till -s. 'She walks.'

exercises.question: She ___ (walk) to school now.
exercises.hint: 'Now' visar pågående handling just nu → presens kontinuerlig: am/is/are + verb-ing. 'She is walking.'

exercises.question: I have ___ friends here.
exercises.hint: 'A few' används med räkningsbara (countable) substantiv: a few friends, a few books. 'A little' med oräkningsbara: a little water.

exercises.question: There is ___ water left.
exercises.hint: 'Water' är oräkningbart (uncountable) – det kan inte räknas med siffror. Oräkningbara → 'a little'.

exercises.question: This is ___ book.
exercises.hint: 'My' används FÖRE ett substantiv: 'my book'. 'Mine' används utan substantiv efter.

exercises.question: This book is ___.
exercises.hint: Inga substantiv efter → 'mine'. 'This book is mine' = Det här är min bok.

exercises.question: Give it to ___.
exercises.hint: 'Me' är objektspronomen (används efter prepositioner och som objekt). 'I' är subjektspronomen. 'Give it to me' – 'to' kräver objektsform.

exercises.question: She helped ___.
exercises.hint: 'Us' är objektsform av 'we'. Verb + objekt → objektspronomen: me, you, him, her, it, us, them.

exercises.question: I think it ___ rain tomorrow.
exercises.hint: 'Will' används för spontana beslut och förutsägelser utan bevis. 'I think' antyder en spontan tanke → 'will'.

exercises.question: Look at the clouds! It ___ rain.
exercises.hint: 'Is going to' används när det finns bevis för framtiden (molnen = bevis). 'Look!' visar att vi ser ett tecken.
'Used to' + verbets grundform beskriver en gammal vana som inte längre sker. T.ex. 'She used to play' = Hon brukade spela.

exercises.question: He is taller ___ me.
exercises.hint: 'Than' används vid jämförelser med komparativ (-er). 'Taller than' = längre än. Inte 'that'.

exercises.question: I am interested ___ music.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: 'interested in'. Lär dig vanliga kombinationer: interested in, good at, afraid of.
'Since' + specifik tidpunkt (år, datum, klockslag). 'For' + tidsperiod (three years, a week). 2020 är en tidpunkt → 'since'.

exercises.sentence: We have lived here ___ three years.
exercises.hint: 'For' + tidsperiod (how long). 'Since' + startpunkt (when). 'Three years' är en period → 'for'.

exercises.question: She is good ___ maths.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: 'good at' (bra på). T.ex. 'good at swimming', 'good at maths'. Inte 'good in'.

exercises.sentence: He stopped ___ (talk) when the teacher came.
exercises.hint: 'Stop' + gerund (-ing): 'stop talking' = sluta prata. 'Stop to do' = stanna för att göra något (annat).

exercises.question: There are ___ students in the class.
exercises.hint: 'Many' + räkningsbara (countable) substantiv: many students, many books. 'Much' + oräkningbara: much water, much time.

exercises.question: There isn't ___ sugar.
exercises.hint: 'Sugar' är oräkningbart (uncountable) – det kan inte räknas med siffror. Oräkningbara → 'much'.
Fast fras: 'on time' = i tid (punktligt). 'In time' = i tid (hinner). 'Arrived on time' = anlände punktligt.

helpText: Blandad grammatik – här tränar du på flera regler på en gång.
Some/any: some används i påståenden (I have some apples), any i frågor och negationer (Do you have any? / I don't have any).
Objektspronomen: I→me, he→him, she→her, they→them, we→us. 'Give it to me, not him!'
Will vs going to: will = spontant beslut/förutsägelse. Going to = planerat beslut.
Tips: Läs varje fråga noga – ibland avslöjar resten av meningen vilken regel som gäller.

grammar.title: Substantiv – Singular & Plural
grammar.description: Hur man bildar plural av substantiv, inklusive oregelbundna former.

exercises.question: Vad är plural av 'child'?
exercises.explanation: 'Child' är ett oregelbundet substantiv. Plural är 'children'.

exercises.question: Vad är plural av 'box'?
exercises.explanation: Substantiv som slutar på -x, -s, -sh, -ch får -es i plural: boxes.

exercises.hint: Oregelbunden pluralform.
exercises.explanation: 'Mouse' → 'mice' är ett oregelbundet substantiv.

exercises.question: Vad är plural av 'city'?
exercises.explanation: Substantiv som slutar på -y (med konsonant före) → byt y mot -ies: cities.

exercises.hint: Slutar på -f eller -fe.
exercises.explanation: Substantiv som slutar på -f/-fe → byt mot -ves: leaf → leaves.

exercises.question: Vad är plural av 'woman'?
exercises.explanation: 'Woman' → 'women' är ett oregelbundet substantiv.

exercises.question: Vilket av dessa är ett räknebart substantiv?
exercises.explanation: 'Apple' är räknebart – du kan säga 'one apple, two apples'. Water, music och love är icke-räknebara.

exercises.sentence: I have two ___ (tooth) in my pocket.
exercises.hint: Oregelbunden pluralform av tooth.
exercises.explanation: tooth → teeth är oregelbundet.

exercises.question: Välj rätt plural: 'There are three ___ in the sky.' (sheep)
exercises.explanation: 'Sheep' har samma form i singular och plural.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She reads many ___ every summer.' (book)
exercises.explanation: Vanliga substantiv får bara -s i plural: books.

grammar.title: Do / Does – Frågor & Negationer
grammar.description: Använd do och does rätt i frågor och nekande meningar.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ your parents work in the city?'
exercises.explanation: Med your parents (= they) använder vi 'Do'. Do your parents work...?

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'My sister ___ not like horror movies.'
exercises.explanation: Med she (my sister) använder vi 'does not'. My sister does not like...

exercises.hint: Hunden = it, vilket hjälpverb passar?
exercises.explanation: Med it/he/she använder vi 'does' i frågor.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'We ___ not understand the question.'
exercises.explanation: Med we använder vi 'do not'. We do not understand...

exercises.hint: Du = you, vilket ord passar?
exercises.explanation: Med you/I/we/they använder vi 'do' i frågor.

exercises.question: Välj rätt svar: 'Does she speak French?' → 'Yes, she ___.'
exercises.explanation: Kortsvar med does: Yes, she does.

exercises.question: '___ it make sense?' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Med it använder vi 'Does'. Does it make sense?

exercises.hint: Han = he, vilket hjälpverb?
exercises.explanation: Med he/she/it använder vi 'does not' för att neka.

exercises.question: 'Do they like sport?' → 'No, they ___.'
exercises.explanation: Kortsvar: No, they don't. (do not → don't)

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ the teacher explain clearly?'
exercises.explanation: Med the teacher (= she/he) använder vi 'Does'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ umbrella'
exercises.explanation: 'Umbrella' börjar med vokalljudet U, så vi använder 'an'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ university'
exercises.explanation: 'University' börjar med ljudet 'yoo' (som konsonant), så vi använder 'a'.

exercises.hint: Börjar 'honest' med ett vokalljud?
exercises.explanation: 'Honest' uttalas 'onest' – H:et är tyst! Det börjar med vokalljudet O → 'an honest'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ hour'
exercises.explanation: 'Hour' uttalas 'aur' – H:et är tyst. Det börjar med vokalljudet → 'an hour'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ European country'
exercises.explanation: 'European' uttalas 'yoo-ro-pee-an' – börjar med konsonantljudet Y → 'a European'.

exercises.sentence: I saw ___ elephant at the zoo.
exercises.hint: Vilket ljud börjar elefant med?
exercises.explanation: 'Elephant' börjar med vokalljudet E → 'an elephant'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'He is ___ engineer.'
exercises.explanation: 'Engineer' börjar med vokalljudet E → 'an engineer'.

exercises.hint: Vilket ljud börjar nurse med?
exercises.explanation: 'Nurse' börjar med konsonantljudet N → 'a nurse'.

exercises.question: '___ one-way street' – välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'One' uttalas 'wun' – börjar med konsonantljudet W → 'a one-way street'.

exercises.question: '___ apple ___ day keeps the doctor away.' Välj rätt för det första tomrummet:
exercises.explanation: 'Apple' börjar med vokalljudet A → 'an apple'.

grammar.title: Is / Am / Are – Be-verbets former
grammar.description: Använd rätt form av be-verbet i olika situationer.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'The books ___ on the shelf.'
exercises.explanation: 'Books' = plural → are. The books are on the shelf.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'Neither the cat nor the dog ___ outside.'
exercises.explanation: Med 'neither...nor' styr det närmaste substantivet (dog) formen → is.

exercises.sentence: My friends and I ___ going to the cinema.
exercises.hint: Vi = we/friends+I, vilket ord passar?
exercises.explanation: 'My friends and I' = we → are. We are going to the cinema.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'The news ___ interesting today.'
exercises.explanation: 'News' är singulart på engelska → is. The news is interesting.

exercises.hint: 'Each of' = singulart, vilket ord passar?
exercises.explanation: 'Each of' tar singular → is. Each of the students is responsible.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'There ___ many people at the party.'
exercises.explanation: 'Many people' = plural → are. There are many people.

exercises.question: 'Mathematics ___ my favourite subject.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Ämnesnamn som slutar på -ics är singulara → is. Mathematics is...

exercises.sentence: You and your sister ___ welcome here.
exercises.hint: You + sister = vi/de, vilket ord?
exercises.explanation: You and your sister = they/we → are.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'The team ___ playing well tonight.'
exercises.explanation: 'Team' som kollektiv enhet → is (brit. Eng. varierar). The team is playing well.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'I ___ not sure about that.'
exercises.explanation: Med I använder vi alltid 'am'. I am not sure.

grammar.title: Have / Has
grammar.description: Lär dig skillnaden mellan have och has.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She ___ a new bicycle.'
exercises.explanation: Med she/he/it använder vi 'has'. She has a new bicycle.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'We ___ a lot of homework today.'
exercises.explanation: Med we/you/they/I använder vi 'have'. We have a lot of homework.

exercises.hint: Hunden = it, vilket ord?
exercises.explanation: Med it (hunden) använder vi 'has'. The dog has a long tail.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'I ___ two brothers.'
exercises.explanation: Med I använder vi 'have'. I have two brothers.

exercises.hint: De = they, vilket ord?
exercises.explanation: Med they/we/you/I använder vi 'have'.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'He ___ a great sense of humour.'
exercises.explanation: Med he använder vi 'has'. He has a great sense of humour.

exercises.question: 'My parents ___ a house in the countryside.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'My parents' = they → have. My parents have a house.

exercises.hint: Skolan = it, vilket ord?
exercises.explanation: Med it (skolan) använder vi 'has'. Our school has a big library.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'You ___ a really good idea!'
exercises.explanation: Med you använder vi 'have'. You have a really good idea!

exercises.question: 'Each student ___ a textbook.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Each student' = singular (he/she/it) → has.

grammar.title: This / That / These / Those
grammar.description: Pekord för nära och längre bort, singular och plural.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ book here is mine.' (nära/singular)
exercises.explanation: Nära + singular = This. This book here is mine.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ mountains over there are beautiful.' (långt bort/plural)
exercises.explanation: Långt bort + plural = Those. Those mountains are beautiful.

exercises.sentence: ___ are my friends. (pekar på folk bredvid sig)
exercises.hint: Nära + plural = ?
exercises.explanation: Nära + plural = These. These are my friends.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ car over there is fast.' (singular/långt)
exercises.explanation: Långt bort + singular = That. That car over there is fast.

exercises.sentence: Is ___ your pen? (pekar på penna nära dig)
exercises.hint: Nära + singular = ?
exercises.explanation: This (nära + singular). Is this your pen?

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ are interesting books. (håller i dem)
exercises.explanation: Nära + plural = These. These are interesting books.

exercises.question: '___ was a great film!' (pratar om en film du precis sett)
exercises.explanation: Syftar på något specifikt/just passat → That. That was a great film!

exercises.sentence: Look at ___ stars! (stjärnor långt bort, plural)
exercises.hint: Långt bort + plural = ?
exercises.explanation: Those (långt bort + plural). Look at those stars!

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'Can I try ___ shoes? (i butiken, pekar på skor du håller i)
exercises.explanation: Nära + plural = These. Can I try these shoes?

exercises.question: '___ days, everyone uses smartphones.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'These days' är ett fast uttryck som means 'nuförtiden'.

grammar.title: There is / There are
grammar.description: Hur man pratar om vad som finns på en plats.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ a cat in the garden.'
exercises.explanation: En katt = singular → There is a cat in the garden.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ many students in the classroom.'
exercises.explanation: Many students = plural → There are many students.

exercises.hint: Två böcker = plural.
exercises.explanation: Plural → There are two books on the table.

exercises.question: Välj rätt negation: '___ no milk in the fridge.'
exercises.explanation: Milk = uncountable/singular → There isn't any milk.

exercises.hint: Ett problem = singular.
exercises.explanation: Singular → There is a problem with the computer.

exercises.question: Frågeform: '___ any water in the bottle?'
exercises.explanation: Singular/uncountable → Is there any water?

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ a lot of noise outside.'
exercises.explanation: 'A lot of noise' = uncountable singular → There is a lot of noise.

exercises.hint: Flera orsaker = plural.
exercises.explanation: Plural (several reasons) → There are several reasons.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ fifty states in the USA.'
exercises.explanation: Fifty states = plural → There are fifty states.

exercises.question: '___ anything interesting on TV tonight?'
exercises.explanation: Anything = singular/uncountable → Is there anything interesting?

reading.title: A Day in the City
reading.description: En dag på stan — läs och svara på frågor.
reading.text:
Emma and her friend Liam decided to spend Saturday in the city. They took the bus into town and arrived at ten o'clock in the morning.

First, they visited the big museum near the park. Emma loved the history section, but Liam preferred the science exhibition where you could try different experiments. They spent two hours there.

Afterwards, they felt hungry, so they went to a small Italian restaurant around the corner. Emma ordered a pizza and Liam had pasta. The food was delicious.

In the afternoon, they walked through the shopping centre. Emma bought a new book about space, and Liam found a cool poster for his room.

On the bus home, they agreed it had been a fantastic day. 'We should do this every weekend,' said Liam. Emma smiled and nodded.

questions.question: What did Emma buy at the shopping centre?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Emma bought a new book about space'.

questions.question: How did they feel at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Liam said 'We should do this every weekend' and Emma smiled — they were clearly very happy with their day.

questions.question: What does this text show about Emma and Liam's friendship?
options: They argue a lot and have nothing in common.
They have different interests but enjoy spending time together.
They only spend time together because they have to.
Emma is always in charge of their plans.
questions.explanation: They chose different things at the museum — different interests — but had a great time together. Good friends can have different tastes!

helpText: Läsförståelse: leta efter svar på frågorna direkt i texten – svaren finns där!
Läs texten en gång för helheten, sen en gång med frågorna i tankarna.
'Mellan raderna'-frågor kräver att du tänker till – vad ANTYDER texten?
Tips: Du kan alltid scrolla tillbaka och läsa texten igen under frågorna.

reading.title: The Water Cycle
reading.text:
Water is everywhere on Earth. It covers more than 70% of our planet's surface. But how does water travel around the Earth? The answer is the water cycle.

The water cycle has several stages. First, the sun heats up water in oceans, rivers, and lakes. This causes the water to evaporate — it turns from liquid into water vapour (a kind of gas) and rises into the air.

When the water vapour rises high into the atmosphere, it cools down and turns back into tiny water droplets. These droplets form clouds. This process is called condensation.

When clouds collect enough droplets, the water falls back to Earth as rain, snow, or hail. This is called precipitation.

The water then flows back into rivers, lakes, and oceans — and the whole cycle begins again. Without the water cycle, there would be no rain, no rivers, and no life on Earth.

questions.question: What is condensation?
options: When water flows into the sea.
When water vapour turns into water droplets.
When rain falls to the ground.
questions.explanation: The text says condensation is when water vapour 'cools down and turns back into tiny water droplets'.

questions.question: Why is the sun important for the water cycle?
options: It heats water and causes evaporation, starting the cycle.
questions.explanation: The text says the cycle starts when 'the sun heats up water' causing evaporation — without the sun, the cycle wouldn't start.

questions.question: Why does the author say 'Without the water cycle, there would be no life on Earth'?
options: Because humans invented the water cycle.
Because all living things need water to survive, and the cycle makes water available.
Because the water cycle creates oxygen.
Because animals can only drink rainwater.
questions.explanation: All living things need water. The water cycle continuously moves water around the planet, making it available. Without it, water would stay only in the oceans.

helpText: Det här är en faktatetext – leta efter specifika fakta och siffror som svar.
Faktatexter har ofta en tydlig struktur: inledning, fakta, slutsats.
Tips: Nyckelord i frågorna hjälper dig hitta rätt stycke i texten.

spelling.title: Skola och vardag
spelling.description: Stava skolord och vardagsord på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('läxa')
exercises.explanation: Homework stavas H-O-M-E-W-O-R-K.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('ordbok')
exercises.explanation: Dictionary stavas D-I-C-T-I-O-N-A-R-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: My ___ shows what I have to do each day. (schema)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Schedule = schema. Stavas S-C-H-E-D-U-L-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('tangentbord')
exercises.explanation: Keyboard stavas K-E-Y-B-O-A-R-D.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Library = bibliotek. Stavas L-I-B-R-A-R-Y.

helpText: Skolord och vardagsord – de ord du behöver mest i engelska varje dag.
Trick: Dela upp långa ord. 'home-work', 'class-mate', 'text-book'.
Tips: Läs ordet, täck det, stava det, kontrollera. Upprepa tills du kan det!

spelling.title: Oregelbundna verb
spelling.description: Stava oregelbundna verb och deras dåtidsformer.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? (dåtid av 'think')
exercises.explanation: Thought stavas T-H-O-U-G-H-T.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Yesterday I ___ a new book at the shop. (köpte)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Bought = köpte. Stavas B-O-U-G-H-T.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? (dåtid av 'bring')
exercises.explanation: Brought stavas B-R-O-U-G-H-T.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: We ___ the lost puppy in the garden. (hittade)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Found = hittade. Stavas F-O-U-N-D.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? (dåtid av 'come')
exercises.explanation: Came stavas C-A-M-E.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Oregelbundna verb har en specialform i preteritum – du måste lära dig dem utantill.
Vanliga par: go/went, eat/ate, see/saw, have/had, come/came, take/took, write/wrote.
Tips: Lär dig dem i tripplar: infinitiv – preteritum – perfektparticip: go – went – gone.

spelling.title: Platser
spelling.description: Stava ord för platser och byggnader på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('sjukhus')
exercises.explanation: Hospital stavas H-O-S-P-I-T-A-L.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Planes take off and land at the ___. (flygplats)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Airport = flygplats. Stavas A-I-R-P-O-R-T.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('museum')
exercises.explanation: Museum stavas M-U-S-E-U-M.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Everest is the highest ___ in the world. (berg)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Mountain = berg. Stavas M-O-U-N-T-A-I-N.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('ö')
exercises.explanation: Island stavas I-S-L-A-N-D.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Ord för platser och byggnader – vanliga ord när du beskriver var du är.
Vanliga platser: library, hospital, museum, restaurant, supermarket, pharmacy, cinema.
Tips: Koppla varje plats till vad man gör där – det hjälper dig minnas stavningen.

spelling.title: Beskrivande ord
spelling.description: Stava adjektiv och beskrivande ord på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('intressant')
exercises.explanation: Interesting stavas I-N-T-E-R-E-S-T-I-N-G.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: It can be ___ to cross the street without looking. (farligt)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Dangerous = farligt. Stavas D-A-N-G-E-R-O-U-S.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('vacker')
exercises.explanation: Beautiful stavas B-E-A-U-T-I-F-U-L.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Difficult = svårt. Stavas D-I-F-F-I-C-U-L-T.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('viktig')
exercises.explanation: Important stavas I-M-P-O-R-T-A-N-T.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Adjektiv och beskrivande ord – bygg upp ditt ordförråd för att beskriva saker mer exakt.
Tänk på komparativ och superlativ när du stavar: beautiful/more beautiful/most beautiful.
Tips: Läs varje ord och försök använda det i en mening – det fastnar bättre!

spelling.title: Sambandsord
spelling.description: Stava sambandsord och adverb på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('eftersom/för att')
exercises.explanation: Because stavas B-E-C-A-U-S-E.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: She was tired; ___, she went to bed early. (därför)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Therefore = därför. Stavas T-H-E-R-E-F-O-R-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('emellertid/dock')
exercises.explanation: However stavas H-O-W-E-V-E-R.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Suddenly = plötsligt. Stavas S-U-D-D-E-N-L-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('äntligen')
exercises.explanation: Finally stavas F-I-N-A-L-L-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Sambandsord (connectors) hjälper dig bygga längre och mer flytande meningar och texter.
Addition: and, also, furthermore, moreover. Kontrast: but, however, although, on the other hand.
Orsak: because, since, as. Resultat: so, therefore, thus.
Tips: Lär dig ett sambandsord i taget och öva att använda det i egna meningar.

wordsearch.title: Länder och städer
wordsearch.description: Hitta engelska namn på kända länder och städer.

wordsearch.title: Sport och hobbies
wordsearch.description: Hitta sport- och hobbyord i denna ordsökning.

clues.clue: An animal's home (also a cosy room)
A playing card / excellent at something
To jump lightly on one foot
